description_long: This object depicts a humanoid figure with extremely elongated, outstretched arms that resemble wings, giving it an avian or fantastical appearance. The figure has a human-like torso, head, and legs, with defined musculature and feminine features. The attire consists of minimal, form-fitting garments that cover the chest, shoulders, and hips, with additional details on the knees. The arms are disproportionately long, extending far beyond the body, and taper to points, suggesting a stylized or supernatural design. The head is bald and the facial features are neutral, with no visible accessories or carried items. The overall form is sleek and stylized, blending human and bird-like characteristics.
description: A stylized humanoid figure with extremely long, wing-like arms, minimal form-fitting clothing, and a bald head. The design blends human and avian features in a sleek, fantastical style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the humanoid figure's face, chest, and the full span of the outstretched, wing-like arms.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extreme length and thinness of the arms, as well as the profile of the head and body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back, legs, and the full extension of the arms from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the arm's length and the body's profile.
attribute_clothing_type: minimal form-fitting top and shorts with stylized shoulder and knee coverings
attribute_posture: standing with arms fully outstretched horizontally
